title: Seseli ghafoorianum
taxonomy: Seseli ghafoorianum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. It belongs to the genus Seseli, which contains various species of plants commonly known as hog's fennel. The plant is native to Iran and is a perennial herbaceous species. Within the Apiaceae family, Seseli ghafoorianum is closely related to other plants such as the wild carrot and the angelica. More specifically, its classification is Seseli ghafoorianum, Apiaceae, Apiales, Magnoliophyta, Plantae.
